explanations.21: Setting jobs=0 tells Pylint to automatically figure out how many processor cores your computer has and use all of them to speed up checking.
explanations.28: This tells Pylint that your code is written for Python version 3.13.0, so it won't complain about using features from newer versions.
explanations.31: Pylint gives your code a score out of 10; this setting makes the program exit with an error if the score drops below 9.50.
